subject: [PATCH v2 12/14] fuse: add pinned payload buffers capability for io-uring buffer rings

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch adds the capability to pin payload buffers in io-uring buffer rings, allowing for direct memcpy of large payload copies and reducing overhead. The pinned pages are accounted against RLIMIT_MEMLOCK and unpinned during connection abort. This feature is particularly beneficial for high-performance systems and can result in a 10% throughput improvement for direct randreads and other operations.
